response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack and geospatial experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ or Rust experience in commercial routing or navigation pipelines, has no demonstrated work with routing tiling, map data transformation, or distributed systems for real-time traffic integration, and their primary stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang — none of which meet the core required skills.
strengths: Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and domains
Strong background in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling
concerns: No demonstrated commercial C++ or Rust experience required for routing tiles
Lacks exposure to navigation data pipelines, routing algorithms, or map optimization
Primary technologies (TypeScript, DLang) do not align with core stack (C++)
